FX.title: [USD/JPY] DOWN: Dollar Selling Pressure and BoJ Dissent Create Bearish Bias
tldr_points: Month-end dollar selling pressure from institutional flows
BoJ policy divergence creates yen support despite Ueda's dovishness
Technical breakdown below critical support validates bearish thesis
FX.excerpt: Dollar weakness and BoJ policy divergence fuel USD/JPY downside; target support at 147.50
FX.comment: Dollar selling pressure and BoJ divergence create bearish setup; target 147.50 support

STOCKS.title: [S&P 500] DOWN: Geopolitical Tension & Mixed Earnings Tilt Bias Bearish
tldr_points: Geopolitical risk from Iran peace talks depresses risk assets
Earnings dispersion widens; defensive sectors outperform
Technical momentum turning negative amid absent support
STOCKS.excerpt: Geopolitical strain and uneven earnings pressure the S&P 500 lower; technical signals turn bearish.
STOCKS.comment: Technical breach of MA20 and negative macro catalysts justify a short bias.

CRYPTO.title: [BTC/USD] UP: Institutional Accrual and Positive Macro Catalysts Reinforce Bullish Outlook
tldr_points: Block’s $2.2B BTC balance signals institutional demand
Japan’s crypto‑linked credit card expands retail exposure
Technical profile shows support near $27,300 and upside bias
CRYPTO.excerpt: Institutional inflows and solid technical support drive a bullish case for BTC/USD.
CRYPTO.comment: Institutional balance sheet buildup and a clean MA20 support make a long bias compelling.
